name: codeclone
description: Baseline-aware structural review for Codex through the local CodeClone MCP server.

interface.longDescription: CodeClone for Codex adds a native local plugin surface over codeclone-mcp. It keeps Codex on the same canonical CodeClone MCP semantics used by the CLI, HTML report, and VS Code extension, while adding a focused skill for conservative-first, triage-first structural review.
defaultPrompt: Use CodeClone to analyze this repo and rank the top production hotspots.
Run a changed-files CodeClone review for my current diff.
Start with the default CodeClone profile, then deepen only if needed.
